results.description:
Fifty isn't the end. It's the beginning of their wildest year yet.

Three lifelong friends. Three very different lives falling apart. One impossible pact.

Claire has been the perfect wife, the perfect mother, the perfect teacher—and she's completely lost herself. Harper chose career over everything and woke up successful, single, and terrified she'll die alone. Nina is drowning in grief eighteen months after her husband's death, going through the motions for her kids while feeling nothing inside.

When they celebrate their 50th birthdays together, they make a deal: one adventure every month for the next year. Twelve experiences that scare them. Twelve chances to feel alive again. Twelve opportunities to become the women they were always meant to be.

The rules are simple: it has to be something none of them have ever done, something that pushes them out of their comfort zones, and they have to do it together. No backing out. No playing it safe. No more letting life pass them by.

But as the months unfold and the adventures get bolder, the consequences in their real lives become impossible to ignore. Claire's marriage is crumbling. Harper's carefully constructed walls are finally coming down. And Nina is learning that healing doesn't mean forgetting—it means choosing to live anyway.

By the time they reach their final challenge, they'll have to answer the question that started it all: What if your best years aren't behind you—what if they're just beginning?
